title: Favorite a View not just a Board
excerpt: The ability to Favorite a board is great, but with users having custom views that they prefer it would be great if the Favorite list was able to specify that full URL of the saved view/tab - not just linking to the Main …

posts.author: AlichiaS (Ali Sawitoski)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to Favorite a board is great, but with users having custom views that they prefer it would be great if the Favorite list was able to specify that full URL of the saved view/tab - not just linking to the Main Table view (as most in our organization don’t use).
